channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Health Benefits of Eating Beans Daily: Digestive, Energy, and Heart Improvements
item.description: If you dey chop half to one cup of beans every day, e fit bring better changes for your body. Beans na very nutritious food wey dey affordable and e get plenty protein, fibre, vitamins, and minerals. ...

item.title: Kate Middleton and Princess Eugenie: How contrasting personalities shaped their distant relationship
item.description: The article explores the long-standing distance between the Princess of Wales, Kate Middleton, and her cousin-in-law, Princess Eugenie. Although both attended Marlborough College and share interests s...

item.title: Philippine men's football coach stays positive despite missing Asian Cup qualification
item.description: Despite the Philippine men's national football team not qualifying for the AFC Asian Cup, head coach Carles Cuadrat remains optimistic about the team's progress and future potential. He emphasized tha...

item.title: Bauchi Governor Shuts Down Some Cattle Markets Over Criminal Activities and Livestock Rustling
item.description: Bauchi State Governor, Bala Mohammed Abdulkadir, don announce say cattle markets inside the state now become prime targets for criminals wey dey steal livestock, terrorise traders and scatter food sup...

item.title: Maple Leafs and Panthers face injury challenges and disappointing season endings
item.description: As the NHL season nears its conclusion, both the Toronto Maple Leafs and Florida Panthers are struggling near the bottom of the league standings, despite having strong aspirations last year. The Maple...

item.title: Kenya’s Textbook Market Faces Power Struggles and Alleged Mismanagement of Billions
item.description: The textbook supply sector in Kenya has become a multi‑billion‑shilling battleground involving publishers, government agencies, and senior education officials. At the core of the dispute lies control ...

item.title: Tanzania Highlights Role of Regional Development and Infrastructure in Africa’s Growth
item.description: Tanzania is stressing how vital regional development, urban planning and proper infrastructure are for driving economic growth and boosting regional integration across Africa. During the 2nd Africa Ur...

item.title: Vanguard Pharmacy Opens New Hub in Ogbomoso, Boosting Community Healthcare
item.description: Vanguard Pharmacy don open a brand new center for healthcare services for people for inside Ogbomoso, and dem say e go change how people dey receive healthcare for di area. Dem say di center go provid...

item.title: Gerda Steyn secures seventh consecutive Two Oceans Marathon win, eyes 10 titles
item.description: Gerda Steyn has once again shown her dominance in South African ultra-marathon running by clinching her seventh consecutive Totalsports Two Oceans Marathon title in Cape Town. Completing the challengi...

item.title: FEU clinches twice-to-beat bonus after sweeping UP in UAAP volleyball
item.description: Far Eastern University (FEU) secured a valuable twice-to-beat advantage in the upcoming UAAP Season 88 women’s volleyball Final Four after convincingly sweeping the University of the Philippines (UP) ...

item.title: Pakistan's Expanding Role as Mediator Between the United States and Iran Highlighted by American Analysts
item.description: American scholars have drawn attention to Pakistan’s growing diplomatic influence as Islamabad hosted marathon negotiations between the United States and Iran. Although the nearly twenty‑one‑hour talk...

item.title: Felix Masai claims victory in 2026 Two Oceans Half-Marathon with all-Kenyan podium finish
item.description: Felix Masai from Kenya dominated the men’s race at the 2026 Two Oceans Half-Marathon, securing first place in a time of 1 hour, 3 minutes and 17 seconds on Sunday morning in Cape Town. The event, know...

item.title: Flick Confident Barcelona Can Overcome Atlético Without a Miracle
item.description: Barcelona continued their strong La Liga season with a 4-1 victory over Espanyol, lifting them to 79 points and nine clear of Real Madrid. Despite the commanding lead, coach Hansi Flick emphasized tha...

item.title: TechCrunch Partners with SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026 to Feature Startup Battlefield Competition
item.description: TechCrunch will participate in SusHi Tech Tokyo 2026, Asia’s largest innovation conference, from April 27–29 at Tokyo Big Sight. Beyond coverage, TechCrunch’s Startup Battlefield program manager, Isab...

item.title: Public leaders cautioned after private WhatsApp video leaks online
item.description: A trending WhatsApp video has stirred fresh debate in political and social circles, after reports emerged that several leaders might have been compromised through leaked private footage. The short cli...

item.title: U.S. Senator Kevin Cramer Advocates for Strong Canada-U.S. Relations Despite Political Differences

item.title: Zanzibar President reaffirms strong partnership with WHO for better healthcare
item.description: Zanzibar President Dr Hussein Mwinyi has reaffirmed the islands commitment to strengthen collaboration with the World Health Organisation (WHO) so as to improve healthcare delivery. He made the remark...

item.title: JD(U) Leader Sanjay Jha Hints at New Government Formation in Bihar After April 13 Amid Nitish Kumar's Rajya Sabha Transition
item.description: In a significant political development in Bihar, the JD(U) working president Sanjay Jha has indicated that a new chief minister and a fresh government may be formed in the state after April 13. This c...
